[![Latest Stable Version](https://poser.pugx.org/sebastian/code-unit-reverse-lookup/v/stable.png)](https://packagist.org/packages/sebastian/code-unit-reverse-lookup) [![CI Status](https://github.com/sebastianbergmann/code-unit-reverse-lookup/workflows/CI/badge.svg)](https://github.com/sebastianbergmann/code-unit-reverse-lookup/actions) [![codecov](https://codecov.io/gh/sebastianbergmann/code-unit-reverse-lookup/branch/main/graph/badge.svg)](https://codecov.io/gh/sebastianbergmann/code-unit-reverse-lookup) # sebastian/code-unit-reverse-lookup Looks up which function or method a line of code belongs to. ## Installation You can add this library as a local, per-project dependency to your project using [Composer](https://getcomposer.org/): ``` composer require sebastian/code-unit-reverse-lookup ``` If you only need this library during development, for instance to run your project's test suite, then you should add it as a development-time dependency: ``` composer require --dev sebastian/code-unit-reverse-lookup ```
